newTests.name:
Tests that ensure-browser! surfaces meaningful errors when core/* calls fail.
   Mocks core functions to return anomaly maps and verifies the error message
   is descriptive instead of a raw ClassCastException. > normal path — launch-chromium returns anomaly > throws with 'Failed to launch browser' and the underlying error message
Unit tests for check-anomaly! — surfaces meaningful errors from anomaly maps > passes through non-anomaly values > returns a number unchanged
Tests for ->launch-options > basic options > creates options with ignore-default-args
Unit tests for check-anomaly! — surfaces meaningful errors from anomaly maps > passes through non-anomaly values > returns nil unchanged
Unit tests for check-anomaly! — surfaces meaningful errors from anomaly maps > passes through non-anomaly values > returns a regular map unchanged
Unit tests for check-anomaly! — surfaces meaningful errors from anomaly maps > passes through non-anomaly values > returns a string unchanged
Tests for ->launch-persistent-context-options > basic options > creates persistent context options with channel

Tests that ensure-browser! surfaces meaningful errors when core/* calls fail.
   Mocks core functions to return anomaly maps and verifies the error message
   is descriptive instead of a raw ClassCastException. > normal path — new-context returns anomaly > throws with 'Failed to create browser context' and the underlying message

Tests that ensure-browser! surfaces meaningful errors when core/* calls fail.
   Mocks core functions to return anomaly maps and verifies the error message
   is descriptive instead of a raw ClassCastException. > normal path — new-page-from-context returns anomaly > throws with 'Failed to create page' and the underlying message

Tests that ensure-browser! surfaces meaningful errors when core/* calls fail.
   Mocks core functions to return anomaly maps and verifies the error message
   is descriptive instead of a raw ClassCastException. > persistent path — launch-persistent-context returns anomaly > throws with 'Failed to launch persistent browser context' and the underlying message
Tests for ->launch-persistent-context-options > basic options > creates persistent context options with headless
Tests for ->launch-persistent-context-options > basic options > creates persistent context options with ignore-default-args
Unit tests for check-anomaly! — surfaces meaningful errors from anomaly maps > throws ex-info for anomaly maps > throws with context message and anomaly message
Unit tests for check-anomaly! — surfaces meaningful errors from anomaly maps > throws ex-info for anomaly maps > preserves original exception as cause
